summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a legendary Fall ’68 show with scorching The Other One, The Eleven and New Potato Caboose, plus priceless Jerry banter.
review: The recording delivers crystal‑clear fall‑68 guitar tone, booming vocals and the iconic stage banter that fans have chased for decades. Musically the performance is off‑the‑charts – The Other One, The Eleven, New Potato Caboose and Dark Star are all cited as mind‑bending highlights – making this one of the era’s top shows.

ai_rating.rationale: All seven reviews award five stars and praise both the musical performance and the pristine soundboard source, indicating an exceptional show with excellent recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, warm fall‑68 guitar tone; clear vocals; stage banter captured without noise; no reported dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A seamless flow of marathon jams – The Other One into The Eleven, a soaring New Potato Caboose, and a Dark Star preceded by legendary Jerry banter – exemplifying the high‑energy, improvisational peak of late 1968.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals praised on every song; his stage banter (“Please let go of your bodies…”, “Whadya want me to do, say everybody HAS to dance?”) is highlighted as priceless.
